# Besori

> Besori (also known as Besori Company, besoricompany or Besori-Company) is an indie studio focused on developing apps and video games, founded in 2025 in Valencia, Spain. Created and led by a single developer passionate about technology, Besori is committed to minimalist interfaces, useful and accessible tools, and open-source software.

## Philosophy

- Simple and minimalist interfaces: low barrier to entry, anyone can install and use the products.
- Optional technical depth: some products are open source and allow advanced customisation.
- Open-source friendly: part of the software is or will be publicly available.

## Products

- **Besori Cloud**: web-based file manager. Store and organise files on your own devices or servers. Currently in development.
- **Kael**: orchestrator and agent for local and online AI models, with window and system control. Currently in development.

- Contact: info.besori@gmail.com

- [Home](https://en.besoricompany.com/): products, channels and feedback.
